name: Temporary Full Exclusion
description: A test scenario where client 2 opts for full exclusion but only for rounds 1-3, after which it returns to normal participation.

expected_tracks.global: Global track (for clients 3, 4, 5 without specific disagreements)

round_1_rules.description: Client 0's track should exclude clients 1 and 2 (2 is fully excluded)
Client 1's track should exclude clients 2 and 3 (2 is fully excluded)
Client 3's track should exclude client 2 (fully excluded)
Client 4's track should exclude client 2 (fully excluded)
Client 5's track should exclude client 2 (fully excluded)

round_4_rules.description: Client 0's track should exclude client 1 only (client 2's full exclusion expired)
Client 1's track should exclude client 3 only (client 2's full exclusion expired)
Client 2 should be on the global track after its full exclusion expired
